revenue_recognition.royalties: Sales-based royalties recognized as franchise sales occur
revenue_recognition.ada_fees: Deferred and apportioned pro-rata to each FA signed, then straight-line over FA term
revenue_recognition.transfer_fees: Straight-line over remaining franchise agreement term

trade_brand_names.impairment: Annual assessment Dec 1; qualitative analysis only; no impairment charges recorded

income_taxes.treatment: Disregarded entity for federal and primarily all state tax purposes
income_taxes.provision: No US federal income tax provision; foreign withholding taxes only

accounting_policies.lease_accounting: Not applicable — franchisor entity has no direct lease obligations; leases are held by franchisees and affiliates
accounting_policies.vie_consolidation: Franchise entities and NAF LLC not consolidated as Company is not primary beneficiary
accounting_policies.subsequent_events: Evaluated through April 7, 2025; no items to disclose
accounting_policies.contingencies: No material legal proceedings expected to have adverse effect

securitized_debt_detail.security: Substantially all assets of Guarantors including the Company

related_party_franchisee.note: Former interim CEO of PF Inc. (board member) has financial interest in franchisee
